subcodes.first_line: O thou who art quickened by the divine fragrances in this glorious age and bounteous dispensation, strive and make a mighty effort to become a source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زنده بنفحات رحمن در این عصر مجید و عهد کریم جهدی کن و همتی نما که منشا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
